candidate_baseline_topk_plain_v0.description: Top-k candidate baseline without LLM span narrowing or filtering.
candidate_baseline_topk_plain_v0.name: Candidate baseline over topk_plain_v0

filter_topk_plain_v0.description: LLM filter over ordinary top-k bounded snippets.
filter_topk_plain_v0.name: Filter over topk_plain_v0

filter_topk_scores_provenance_v0.description: LLM filter with retrieval score/provenance metadata.
filter_topk_scores_provenance_v0.name: Filter over topk_scores_provenance_v0

p25_bucket_routed_v0_plain.description: Existing P25 bucket-routed policy that chooses span_narrow, filter, or candidate baseline from public task/risk buckets.
p25_bucket_routed_v0_plain.name: P25 bucket_routed_v0 over topk_plain_v0

rmc_hybrid_v0.description: Fixed RMC policy: weak for unsupported cases, plain span narrow for positive supported cases, hard-distractor filter for no-gold/hard cases.
rmc_hybrid_v0.name: RMC hybrid v0

rmc_llm_pack_routed_v0.description: Fixed RMC policy: plain span narrow for positives, hard-distractor filter for no-gold/hard/ambiguous cases.
rmc_llm_pack_routed_v0.name: RMC LLM pack routed v0

rmc_local_conservative_v0.description: Fixed RMC policy: suppress negative/hard/no-gold/ambiguous cases to weak candidate only with no extra LLM call.
rmc_local_conservative_v0.name: RMC local conservative v0

span_narrow_contrastive_competitor_v0.description: LLM span narrowing with competitor slots but no hard-distractor proxies.
span_narrow_contrastive_competitor_v0.name: Span narrow over contrastive_competitor_v0

span_narrow_hard_distractor_contrast_v0.description: LLM span narrowing with metadata-selected hard-distractor proxies.
span_narrow_hard_distractor_contrast_v0.name: Span narrow over hard_distractor_contrast_v0

span_narrow_topk_plain_v0.description: LLM span narrowing with ordinary top-k bounded snippets.
span_narrow_topk_plain_v0.name: Span narrow over topk_plain_v0

span_narrow_topk_scores_provenance_v0.description: LLM span narrowing with retrieval score/provenance/channel metadata.
span_narrow_topk_scores_provenance_v0.name: Span narrow over topk_scores_provenance_v0

glm_5_2_json_schema_strict.notes: Viable for controlled cross-family comparison, but weaker than Kimi tool_call.

glm_5_2_tool_call.notes: Tool-call mode produced bad-response-status-code noise; not suitable for quality aggregate.

kimi_k2_7_code_json_schema_strict.notes: Schema-stable but slower and leaves more false spans than tool_call.

kimi_k2_7_code_tool_call.notes: Primary Breakthrough Sprint reference: full schema stability, low fallback, strong span-narrow signal.

qwen3_6_27b_json_schema_strict.notes: Severe rate-limit/fallback noise and very high latency; not quality-interpretable.

qwen3_6_27b_tool_call.notes: Both Qwen output modes hit substantial rate-limit/fallback noise; do not include in quality aggregate until lower-concurrency fix.

recommendations.recommendation: Positive on matched aggregate cells, but not general: verify on a broader public corpus and held-out models before any default change.
Not globally supported as a span-narrow pack; route hard-distractor contrast only to selective filter/no-gold cases after repair.
Hard-distractor filter lost gold in this bounded sample; do not adopt globally without repair.
Fragile trade-off: higher SpanF0.5 but more false spans, higher PFP, and higher latency. Use selectively, not as default.
Fixed RMC hybrid did not beat P25; needs interpretable policy search or narrower bucket-specific routing.
Fixed RMC LLM routing did not beat P25; needs searched routing.
Local conservative route avoided false positives but collapsed recall.
Adapter degraded/rate-limit; exclude from quality aggregation until a lower-concurrency fix is validated.
Adapter degraded/rate-limit; exclude from quality aggregation until a lower-concurrency fix is validated.
Usable as secondary cross-family validation; do not use as primary reference.
